source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
(1) "To endure," "to bear with" (Isa 1:13), "I cannot away with iniquity and the solemn meeting," i e. endure the combination of wickedness and worship. In the Hebrew merely, "I am unable iniquity and the solenm meeting."

(2) To destroy airo. Found in such expressions as Ac 22:22, "Away with such a fellow from the earth."
